data.label: 1DS
data.description: 1DS（One Data Strategy，也称为 One Observability）C/C++ SDK 支持从多种 Microsoft 产品中进行跨平台遥测收集。它支持将数据/遥测上传到 Collector++。

data.label: 1DS
data.description: 1DS (One Data Strategy, also known as One Observability) C/C++ SDK enables cross-platform telemetry collection from various Microsoft products. It enables data / telemetry upload to Collector++.
